prose.en: The cooling supply system is designed in such a way that the permissible operating and environmental parameters are also ensured on at least five consecutive days with the highest outside temperatures that can reasonably be estimated to occur at the locations of the premises and buildings within the lifespan of the cooling supply system, with an appropriate safety margin.

guidance.en: This subcriterion demands the implementation of concrete measures to fulfil the policy required by PS-01.03AC. The cloud service provider also determines the highest outside temperatures that can reasonably be estimated to occur at the locations of the premises and buildings within the lifespan of the cooling supply system as part of PS-01.03AC.
